name: Order-Adaptive Entropy Gating + BackoffNgramMixer + Drift-Free TTT
blurb: Novel order-adaptive entropy gating: per-order entropy centers (order 7→3.0, order 2→4.5) replace single-threshold mixing, trusting higher n-gram orders at lower model entropy. 18% improvement over PR #779 baseline (0.6713→0.5466). BackoffNgramMixer (orders 2-7) + drift-free TTT (Q-proj only, Polyak averaging). 3-seed mean: 0.5466 (std 0.0010). All artifacts strictly under 16MB.
author: travispchen
